question_text: A triangular table of cumulative paid losses is provided in data.csv. Calculate the ultimate losses for each accident year using the chain-ladder method. Print the final list of ultimate losses.
setup_code:
import pandas as pd

data = [[350, 600, 800, 950], [450, 750, 1000, None], [550, 900, None, None], [700, None, None, None]]
triangle = pd.DataFrame(data, index=[2019, 2020, 2021, 2022])

verification.evaluation_script: import numpy as np\nassert np.allclose(actual, expected, atol=0.01)
